response.justification: Bogdan Szabo has extensive experience in software development with a strong background in geospatial projects (GISCollective) and performance-critical systems (low-latency apps, AI-agent infrastructure). However, his primary expertise in JavaScript/TypeScript, Dlang, and Node.js does not align closely with the required C++/Rust focus for the routing tiling role. His lack of direct experience with modern C++ or distributed systems in geospatial contexts raises concerns, though his problem-solving approach and willingness to learn new technologies are positives.
strengths: Strong background in geospatial data processing (GISCollective platform)
Experience with low-latency systems and distributed infrastructure (Optilyz, Dunnhumby)
Proven ability to learn and adapt to new technologies (e.g., AI-agent infrastructure at re:cinq)
concerns: Limited direct experience with modern C++ or Rust (primary technologies for the role)
No explicit mention of navigation systems or routing data pipelines in work history
Heavy focus on JavaScript/TypeScript and Dlang rather than C++ or Linux server applications
